summary: Persistent Ad Slot architecture testing for UniversalDropzone. All 14 test cases passed across video/audio/image converter pages and homepage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persistent Ad Slot architecture fully verified. PersistentAdSlot sub-component in UniversalDropzone renders both slots in DOM at all times. Visibility controlled via Tailwind hidden/block. IDLE: drag_menu_under=block, download_ready_ad=hidden. PENDING: same as idle. SUCCESS state logic is correct in code (conversionStatus=success sets download_ready_ad visible) but could not be fully E2E tested since actual conversion requires valid media file. All data-testids confirmed: persistent-ad-drag_menu_under, persistent-ad-download_ready_ad. No old ad-drag-menu-under divs found on converter pages. Homepage has UniversalDropzone which also renders persistent ad slots + tools_infeed_1 from AdSlot (data-testid=ad-slot-tools_infeed_1-300x250).

success_state.note: Logic verified in code: conversionStatus=success when allDone=true -> download_ready_ad isVisible=true, drag_menu_under isVisible=false. Could not fully E2E test as dummy .mp4 file does not trigger real conversion.
